name: Monzo Developer API
description: Monzo bank developer API: accounts, transactions, webhooks, feed items (OAuth2).

seo.title: Monzo Developer API — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Monzo Developer API: Monzo bank developer API: accounts, transactions, webhooks, feed items (OAuth2).

when_to_use: Reading Monzo account transactions and balances via OAuth2 API
Triggering custom feed items and webhooks from Monzo account events
Building personal finance tools on top of Monzo transaction data
Automating savings or expense tracking using Monzo developer webhooks

pros: OAuth2 access to Monzo accounts and transactions
Webhooks and feed items for real-time flows
Good for personal automation and apps
cons: Individual users can only access own data
Not a payment gateway for merchants
Rate limits and feature scope limited
review.verdict: Nice personal-finance API for Monzo users — not a commercial payment gateway despite category label.
review.best_for: Monzo customers building personal automations or side projects
review.not_for: Merchants needing payment acceptance or commercial APIs
